_comment: Manual safety net for any knockout match. Map a match id (r32-01 .. r32-16, r16-01 .., cf-01 .., sf-01 .., 3p-01, f-01) to an exact result. g1/g2 are the full-time goals (after extra time, before penalties) in the match's own team1-team2 order; adv is the 3-letter code of the team that ADVANCES (penalty winner on a draw). Overrides always win over the API. Remove an entry to hand control back to the API.
